street_food.name: Warung Babi Guling Ibu Oka
street_food.notes: A Balinese institution — Anthony Bourdain ate here

street_food.name: Warung Nasi Ayam Kedewatan
street_food.notes: Order everything and point — nothing disappoints

budget.name: Naughty Nuri's Warung
budget.notes: Legendary ribs — the queue is worth it

mid_range.name: Hujan Locale
mid_range.notes: Chef Will Meyrick's celebration of Indonesia's regional cuisines

fine_dining.name: Locavore
fine_dining.notes: Asia's 50 Best Restaurants — worth every rupiah

Bali.food_notes: Try a $3 nasi campur (mixed rice) for a complete, authentic Balinese meal. Eat at warungs (small local restaurants) for the best food.

street_food.name: Nishiki Market Stalls
street_food.notes: Kyoto's kitchen — 100 stalls in a narrow arcade

budget.name: Ippudo Ramen Kyoto
budget.notes: Japan's most famous ramen chain — queue expected but fast

budget.name: Kyoto Gogyo
budget.notes: Black burnt miso broth — unlike anything else in Japan

mid_range.name: Kikunoi Honten
mid_range.notes: 3 Michelin stars — the definitive kaiseki experience at a relatively accessible price

fine_dining.name: Nakamura
fine_dining.reservation_notes: Reserve months in advance for dinner
fine_dining.notes: Operating since 1716 — the pinnacle of Kyoto cuisine

Kyoto.food_notes: Kyoto cuisine emphasizes delicacy and seasonal ingredients. Try yudofu (hot tofu), obanzai (home-style small dishes), and warabi mochi for dessert.

street_food.name: La Boqueria Market Stalls
street_food.notes: Go at opening — midday it's packed with tourists and vendors get annoyed

budget.name: Bar Calders
budget.notes: A local neighborhood bar — the kind tourists don't find but locals love

mid_range.name: Bodega Sepúlveda
mid_range.notes: Barcelona's best natural wine list with exceptional charcuterie

mid_range.name: Quimet & Quimet
mid_range.notes: Tiny standing bar open only lunch — worth squeezing in for the best montaditos in Barcelona

fine_dining.name: Disfrutar
fine_dining.notes: #2 Best Restaurant in the World 2023 — a once-in-a-lifetime meal

Barcelona.food_notes: Eat lunch (14:00-16:00) like a local — it's the main meal, cheaper and often comes with a prix-fixe menu del día for €12-15.

street_food.name: Supplì Roma
street_food.notes: Best street snack in Rome — cheese pull is spectacular

budget.name: Da Enzo al 29
budget.notes: The definitive Roman trattoria — reserve a week ahead for evenings

mid_range.name: Roscioli Salumeria
mid_range.notes: Rome's best food destination — also a deli, bakery, and incredible wine cellar

fine_dining.name: La Pergola
fine_dining.notes: Rome's only 3 Michelin star restaurant — stunning Rome panorama

Rome.food_notes: The four Roman pastas: carbonara, cacio e pepe, amatriciana, gricia. Never order them anywhere else — they'll disappoint. Gelato: look for 'artigianale' sign and natural colors.

street_food.name: Marché des Enfants Rouges
street_food.notes: Paris's oldest covered market (1615) — an international food hall

budget.name: L'As du Fallafel
budget.notes: Best falafel in Paris — queue wraps around the block for good reason

budget.name: Bouillon Pigalle
budget.notes: Affordable authentic French brasserie — €2 glass of wine, €12 steak frites

mid_range.name: Le Comptoir du Relais
mid_range.notes: Yves Camdeborde's legendary bistro — the place that launched the neo-bistro movement

fine_dining.name: Guy Savoy
fine_dining.notes: 3 Michelin stars in the Mint of Paris — one of the world's truly great restaurants

Paris.food_notes: Do a market picnic: buy a baguette from a boulangerie, cheese from a fromagerie, charcuterie from a charcuterie, and a bottle of Bordeaux — eat in the Luxembourg Gardens for €15 total.

street_food.name: Jay Fai
street_food.notes: Michelin-starred street food — arrive at 14:00 opening or queue 4 hours

street_food.name: Or Tor Kor Market
street_food.notes: Best quality fresh market in Bangkok — also great for exotic tropical fruits

street_food.name: Khao San Road Night Food
street_food.notes: Tourist-friendly but fun — best energy and nightlife food scene in Bangkok

budget.name: Pad Thai Fawng
budget.notes: Best pad thai in Bangkok — simple shop, long queue, worth every minute

mid_range.name: Bo.Lan
mid_range.notes: Champions of sustainable Thai cuisine and forgotten recipes

fine_dining.name: Gaggan Anand
fine_dining.notes: 4x Best Restaurant in Asia — Gaggan's return to Bangkok after legendary success

Bangkok.food_notes: Eat where you see Thais eating. A cart or restaurant with a queue of locals is always better than anywhere with an English menu outside.

street_food.name: Maxwell Food Centre
street_food.notes: Tian Tian stall (stall 10) is Michelin-starred and was Obama's Singapore lunch choice

street_food.name: Lau Pa Sat
street_food.notes: Historic 1894 hawker centre; satay vendors set up outside at night — essential Singapore experience

budget.name: Newton Food Centre
budget.notes: Famous hawker centre — chilli crab is Singapore's national dish

mid_range.name: Candlenut
mid_range.notes: World's first Michelin-starred Peranakan restaurant — Singapore's unique fusion food culture

fine_dining.name: Odette
fine_dining.notes: Asia's #1 restaurant 2023 — inside the National Gallery overlooking the Padang

Singapore.food_notes: Singapore has over 100 hawker centres — eating here is a national pastime. Expect to spend $3-6 for a complete meal. Visit Chinatown, Little India, and Arab Street food areas.

street_food.name: Pastéis de Belém
must_try: Pastel de nata with cinnamon and powdered sugar
street_food.notes: The original since 1837 — eat warm from the oven with a bica (espresso)

budget.name: Solar dos Presuntos
budget.notes: Family-run since 1976 — the definitive traditional Portuguese restaurant

mid_range.name: Time Out Market
mid_range.notes: Lisbon's best chefs under one roof — the original food hall concept that inspired the world

fine_dining.name: Belcanto
fine_dining.notes: José Avillez's 2 Michelin star flagship — Portugal's most celebrated chef

Lisbon.food_notes: Lunch is the main event in Lisbon. Look for 'menu do dia' (€10-12) at local tascas — a starter, main, dessert, wine, and coffee. Atlantic seafood is excellent everywhere.
